arbitrum_sepolia_morpho_rpc.skip_reason: Morpho Blue is not deployed on this testnet

model_breakdown.shap_interpretation: SHAP values show each feature's push toward default (positive SHAP = higher default risk, lower CredScore). Values are on the model's log-odds scale.

feature_derivation.wallet_age_days: Days since earliest on-chain activity (hub + spoke RPC)
feature_derivation.tx_count: Lifetime outbound transaction count across all CredFlow chains
feature_derivation.unique_contracts_interacted: Distinct contract addresses the wallet has called
feature_derivation.active_months_last_6: Distinct calendar months with activity in the last 180 days
feature_derivation.days_since_last_active: Days since the wallet's most recent on-chain activity
feature_derivation.longest_inactive_gap_days: Longest gap between consecutive outbound transfers
feature_derivation.eth_balance: Sum of native ETH balances across chains (wei / 1e18)
feature_derivation.aave_supply_count: Aave V3 Supply events across spoke testnets
feature_derivation.aave_borrow_count: Aave V3 Borrow events (Arbitrum + Base Sepolia)
feature_derivation.multi_protocol_borrow_flag: 1 if borrows on 2+ protocols (hub, Aave, Morpho)
feature_derivation.avg_blocks_to_repay: Mean blocks between borrow and matching repay
feature_derivation.avg_loan_duration_days: Mean days from borrow to repay
feature_derivation.collateral_withdraw_before_borrow_count: Withdrawals shortly before a borrow (risky pattern)
feature_derivation.partial_repay_count: Borrows repaid in multiple transactions before closing
feature_derivation.has_been_liquidated: 1 if any liquidation event (instant red flag)
feature_derivation.burst_activity_flag: 1 if most activity is clustered in a 7-day window
feature_derivation.aave_only_wallet_flag: 1 if wallet only interacted with lending pool contracts
feature_derivation.borrow_then_transfer_out_flag: 1 if outbound transfer followed a borrow within 50 blocks

borrow_sub_score.formula: 40 + repayment/partial_repay bonus + has_borrows(15) + multi_protocol(5) - open_credflow(15) - open_debt(8/proto) - scaled_withdraw(5/count) - liquidations - zero_repays - transfer_out

wallet_sub_score.formula: 30 + age(min 20) + tx(min 15) + contracts(min 15) + active_months(min 10) - wallet_age_flag(15) - liquidations*20 + balance(min 10)
